characters.name: Ah Shu
characters.description: Ah ShuChineseRomanized阿樹ĀshùCharacteristicsGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorDark brownPersonal informationResidenceTaipei, TaiwanEducationYing De Academy(former) Ah Shu(Chinese: 阿樹;pinyin:Āshù) was a former student atYing De Academy. He was one of the few people to stand up to theF4, the school's ruling clique. As a result, Ah Shu received ared cardfrom the F4 and was by bullied by his classmates. Ah Shu ultimately decided to drop out of Ying De Academy and returned briefly to retrieve his belongings. Ah Shu studied atYing De Academy, a college for the upper-crust of society. He was a classmate ofDong Shan Cai. Before winter break in 2001, Ah Shu stood up to theF4saying "You think everybody is afraid of you? Not me!"Dao Ming Sireplied "Do you know who you're talking to?" Ah Shu was subsequently given ared card, which the F4 gave to whoever oppose or angered them. He was bullied and ostracized by the other students. Ah Shu only lasted a week, before deciding to drop out of Ying De. He briefly returned after winter break to retrieve the rest of his belongings. Hisprofessorgave him advice on his way out, advising Ah Shu to not be a "black sheep" from then on. He left without replying to him.[1]

characters.name: Ah Song
characters.description: Ah SongChineseRomanized阿松ĀsōngCharacteristicsGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownPersonal informationOccupationArtistPart-time at a restaurantResidenceTaiwanRomancesAh Xiang(girlfriend) Ah Song(Chinese: 阿松;pinyin:Āsōng) was an artist, diver, and the boyfriend ofAh Xiang. Ah Song began to doubt his dreams of becoming an artist, which led to an argument with Ah Xiang while on vacation. She broke up with Ah Song, who remained in the smallfishing villageto wait for her. There he later metDong Shan Cai. Ah Song reunites withAh Xiang

characters.name: Ah Song
characters.description: Ah SongChineseRomanized阿松ĀsōngCharacteristicsGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownPersonal informationOccupationArtistPart-time at a restaurantResidenceTaiwanRomancesAh Xiang(girlfriend) Ah Song(Chinese: 阿松;pinyin:Āsōng) was an artist, diver, and the boyfriend ofAh Xiang. characters.name: Ah Xiang
characters.description: Ah XiangChineseRomanized阿香ĀxiāngCharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownPersonal informationResidenceTaiwanRomancesAh Song(boyfriend) Ah Xiang(Chinese: 阿香;pinyin:Āxiāng) was the girlfriend ofAh Song. They began dating after meeting at school. She supported his dreams of being an artist. Ah Xiang broke up with Ah Song on the beach of a smallfishing Village, due to tensions over their future. They reunited on the same beach several months later when Ah Xiang returned to him. Ah Xiang attended the same school asAh Song, whom she eventually began dating. She was also the president of her class.[1]Ah Xiang supported Ah Song's dreams of becoming an artist and studying inItaly, when he lost confidence. Tensions began to brew between the couple, perhaps because of her "magnanimity" towards him. It culminated while they were on vacation at afishing villagewhen Ah Song voiced his wishes to stay there. Ah Xiang broke up with him, feeling that he was not thinking of their future. Additionally, she felt stressed about having to support her family. Some months after the break up, Ah Xiang returned to the village. She found Ah Song at the same beach where she had broken up with him and jumped into his arms. They then held each other for a long time.[2]

characters.name: Ah Xiang

characters.name: Ah Yuan
characters.description: Ah YuanChineseRomanized阿源ĀyuánCharacteristicsGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownPersonal informationOccupationBusinessman(former)ResidenceSouthernTaiwanFamilyXin Xin(adoptive daughter)ChildrenRomancesWife Ah Yuan(Chinese: 阿源;pinyin:Āyuán) was the adoptive father ofXin Xin. He was living by the beach, whenDao Ming Siwashed up near his home. Ah Yuan and Si gradually became good friends. Ah Yuan lived in the city, where he operated his own business. However, his business went bankrupt, leaving him in heavy debt. His wife then left him and took their children with her. Later, his apartment was repossessed and he was forced to leave. On his way out,Xin Xin, the abused child of his neighbor, grabbed his arm, so he brought her with him.[1]

characters.name: Ah Yue
characters.description: Ah YueChineseRomanized阿月ĀyuèCharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownPersonal informationOccupationBabysitter[1](former)ResidenceHomeinTaipei, TaiwanFamilyDong Shan Cai(daughter)RomancesDong(husband)AffiliationDong family Ah Yue(Chinese: 阿月;pinyin:Āyuè) was the mother ofDong Shan Caiand wife of herhusband. She had been married to her husband for over twenty years. Ah Yue was ambitious and had her daughter enroll atYing De Academyin order for her daughter to marry rich. She particularly encouraged her daughter's relationship withDao Ming Si. Like her husband, Ah Yue had grown up up poor and had to sell her blood to make money occasionally.[2]In her youth, Ah Yue was crowned "Miss Meatball" (貢丸小姐) ofHsinchu.[3]

characters.name: Aisa
characters.description: AisaChineseRomanized愛紗ÀishāCharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownPersonal informationResidenceJapanFamilyMotherFather†Grandmother†RomancesMei Zuo(kissed) Aisa(Chinese: 愛紗;pinyin:Àishā) was a Japanese girl, who went to Taiwan to find her grandmother. In Taiwan, she stayed with her friend and former classmate,Mai. Aisa later befriendedF4memberMei Zuo. She was born an only child to her parents in Japan. Her father died at some point. Aisa was fond of her grandmother, who lived in Taiwan. She met her friend,Mai, in high school

characters.name: Aisa
characters.description: AisaChineseRomanized愛紗ÀishāCharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownPersonal informationResidenceJapanFamilyMotherFather†Grandmother†RomancesMei Zuo(kissed) Aisa(Chinese: 愛紗;pinyin:Àishā) was a Japanese girl, who went to Taiwan to find her grandmother. characters.name: Aisa's mother
characters.description: Aisa's motherCharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownPersonal informationResidenceJapanFamilyAisa(daughter) This woman was themotherofAisa. She lived inJapanwith her daughter, until she ran away. After searching for a long time, she found Aisa in Taiwan. She became a mother after the birth of her daughter,Aisa. Sometime later, Aisa's father died and her mother wished to remarry. This upset Aisa, who subsequently ran away to Taiwan. It took her mother several months to find her. Upon finding Aisa, she promised to not remarry if she did not approve. The mother and daughter made up and subsequently appeared in a dance contest together. They then headed back to Japan.[1]

characters.name: Aisa's mother

characters.name: Aki and Chimura
characters.description: Aki and ChimuraJapaneseRomanizedアキチムラAkiChimuraCharacteristicsGenderFemalePersonal informationResidenceTokyo, JapanEducationN Middle SchoolAki(アキ) andChimura(チムラ) were two former students atN Middle School. They were friends withTsukushi MakinoandYuki Matsuokaduring middle school. They kept in touch with Yuki and later expressed to her a desire to see Tsukushi again.[1] Character notes

characters.name: Seinosuke Amakusa
characters.description: Seinosuke AmakusaJapaneseRomanized天草 清之介Amakusa SeinosukeNicknameKinsan (byTsukushi)CharacteristicsGenderMaleAge17[1]—18[2]Personal informationOccupationApprentice chef atHanazushiVarious part-time jobsResidenceApartmentinTokyo, JapanFamilyAmakusa (grandfather)[3]Amakusa(father)Amakusa (brother)RomancesAyano Kurimaki(possible)[4]Tsukushi Makino(former crush)EducationEirin AcademyAffiliationAmakusa family Seinosuke Amakusa(天草 清之介,Amakusa Seinosuke), also known asKinsan(金さん,Kinsan), was the former heir of the Amakusa family. He gave up his family name and left home to pursue his dream of becoming a sushi chef. Seinosuke befriendedTsukushi Makinoby helping her through a particularly hard financial time. He later developed unrequited feelings for her. Seinosuke was also engaged toAyano Kurimakiat one point. Seinosuke as a child

characters.name: Seinosuke Amakusa's father
characters.description: AmakusaJapanese天草CharacteristicsGenderMalePersonal informationOccupationPoliticianResidenceTokyo, JapanFamilyAmakusa (father)Seinosuke Amakusa(son)Amakusa (son)[1]AffiliationAmakusa family Amakusa(天草,Amakusa)was the father ofSeinosuke Amakusa. He was a member ofparliament. His family was notable for being politicians for numerous generations. He expected Seinosuke to become a politician like him. He came from a long line of people born and raised inTokyo, Japan, referred to as "Edoites."[2]His family had been politicians for several generations. Amakusa's father had once beenPrime Minister, while he became aparliamentmember.[3]

characters.name: Kazuya Aoike
characters.description: Kazuya AoikeJapaneseRomanized青池 和也Aoike KazuyaNicknameNouveau Riche (byF4)CharacteristicsGenderMaleAge17[1]—18[2]HoroscopeTaurus[3]Blood typeO[3]Personal informationResidenceHomeinSetagaya, Tokyo, Japan[4]FamilyGrandparents[4]Aoike (parents)Aoike (brother)[5]RomancesTsukushi Makino(crush)EducationEitoku AcademyAffiliationAoike CorporationF4(briefly) Kazuya Aoike(青池 和也,Aoike Kazuya)was a friend ofTsukushi Makino, whom he had known since grade school. They were reunited when he transferred toEitoku Academyduring his second year of high school. He had romantic feelings for Tsukushi but never pursued her. Only recently becoming rich, Kazuya often referred to his family as "nouveau riche." Kazuya was born into a modest family of farmers. He became friends withTsukushi Makinowhen they were in the same class during elementary school. They lost contact after moving on to different middle schools.[4]Kazuya also had a younger brother.[5]

characters.description: Kazuya AoikeJapaneseRomanized青池 和也Aoike KazuyaCharacteristicsGenderMaleAge17[1]Hair colorBrownEye colorGreenPersonal informationResidenceHomeinSetagaya, Tokyo, Japan[2]FamilyGrandmother[2]Aoike (parents)RomancesSakurako Sanjo(possible)[3]Tsukushi Makino(crush)EducationEitoku AcademyAffiliationF4(briefly) Kazuya Aoike(青池 和也,Aoike Kazuya)was a student atEitoku Academy. His family recently gained wealth, leading him to be labeled as "nouveau riche." He was an old friend ofTsukushi Makinosince elementary school. Kazuya had a crush on Tsukushi though she never noticed his feelings. He continued being a close friend to her nonetheless. His family were farmers. Kazuya was in the same class asTsukushi Makinoduring elementary school. Tsukushi "always looked after [him]" back then.[2]

characters.name: Yuriko Asai
characters.description: Yuriko AsaiJapaneseRomanized浅井 百合子Asai YurikoCharacteristicsGenderFemalePersonal informationResidenceTokyo, JapanFamilyCousin[1]RomancesEx-boyfriend[2]EducationEitoku AcademyAffiliationLilies Yuriko Asai(浅井 百合子,Asai Yuriko)was a student atEitoku Universityand graduate ofEitoku Senior High. She was the leader of theLilies, a clique she formed with her best friends,Minako YamanoandErika Ayuhara. Yuriko dislikedTsukushi Makinoand bullied her throughout high school, though she was occasionally civil with her. Yuriko attended high school atEitoku Academy, where she was in the same homeroom as her best friends,Minako YamanoandErika Ayuhara.Tsukushi Makinowas also in her class though they never spoke to her.[3]

There she was in the same homeroom as her best friends,Erika AyuharaandMinako Yamano, as well asTsukushi Makino.[1]

characters.name: Asami
characters.description: AsamiJapaneseRomanized麻美AsamiCharacteristicsGenderFemalePersonal informationResidenceTokyo, JapanEducationEitoku Academy Asami(麻美,Asami)was a student atEitoku Senior High. Her best friend was fellow classmate,Kyoko. The two were good friends with another classmateOto Edogawauntil they learned she was poor. They then ceased being her friend and never talked to her again. Asami attendedEitoku AcademywithKyoko, her best friend. Both of them came from upper-class families. They befriendedOto Edogawa, who was also in Class D.[1]The two both admired theCorrect 5and agreed with them doing "peasant hunts." For some days, she and Kyoko gave Oto rides home when she told them her driver was on holiday.[2]A few days later, they invited Oto out to a popular new pancake shop. She was excited for a moment before declining. Asami asked her "Did something happen, Oto?" and assured her that she could talk to them. Oto told them that she was fine.[3]

They then ceased being her friend and never talked to her again. Asami attendedEitoku AcademywithKyoko, her best friend. Both of them came from upper-class families. For some days, she and Kyoko gave Oto rides home when she told them her driver was on holiday.[2]A few days later, they invited Oto out to a popular new pancake shop. She was excited for a moment before declining. Asami asked her "Did something happen, Oto?" and assured her that she could talk to them. Oto told them that she was fine.[3]

characters.name: Mira Renita Asavarattanakul
characters.description: Renita AsavarattanakulThaiเรนิตา อัศวรัตนกุลNicknameMira (by everyone)CharacteristicsGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorDark brownPersonal informationOccupationModel(former)ResidenceApartmentinParis, FranceFamilyAsavarattanakul(parents)RomancesDominique Shun(fiancé)[1]Ren Renrawin Aira(ex-boyfriend)EducationKocher High School Renita Asavarattanakul(Thai: เรนิตา อัศวรัตนกุล), better known asMira(Thai: มิรา), was a former model and socialite. She was a long-time friend of theF4, particularly ofRen. On a trip back home, Mira decided to leave her life of luxury. She returned toFrance, where she pursued her dreams of being a human rights lawyer and later foundlove. Mira andRenas children

characters.name: Erika Ayuhara
characters.description: Erika AyuharaJapaneseRomanized鮎原 えりかAyuhara ErikaCharacteristicsGenderFemalePersonal informationResidenceTokyo, JapanEducationEitoku AcademyAffiliationLilies Erika Ayuhara(鮎原 えりか,Ayuhara Erika)was a student atEitoku Academy. She was best friends withYuriko AsaiandMinako Yamano, collectively known as theLilies. Erika and friends hatedTsukushi Makino, whom they were jealous of. They bullied her on several occasions, though they sometimes pretended to be nice to her. At some point, Erika enrolled atEitoku Academy. During high school, she was placed in the same class as her best friendsYuriko AsaiandMinako Yamano.Tsukushi Makinowas also in their class.[1]

Her best friends wereYuriko AsaiandMinako Yamano. The trio were constantly harassing and bullyingTsukushi Makino. They occasionally tried to suck up to her, such as when they thought she was datingTsukasa Domyoji. She enteredEitoku Academy, where she was in the same homeroom asYuriko AsaiandMinako Yamano, her best friends.Tsukushi Makinowas also in their class.[1]

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobJapaneseRomanizedボブBobuCharacteristicsGenderMalePersonal informationResidenceNew York City, USABob(ボブ,Bobu)was a resident ofNew York City. He was a friend ofThomas, with whom he and several others lived with. Bob became acquainted withTsukushi Makinoduring her trip to New York. Bob lived inNew York Cityin a likely abandoned building with his friends, includingThomas. One day, he and one of his friends came acrossTsukushi Makinowho looked lost. They approached her, but she became frightened. Thomas then appeared and explained their intentions. They brought her to their place, where they celebrated a recent score. Tsukushi accidentally found a gun and tossed into the air. Bob offered to let her hold it.[1]The next day, Bob and the others went to theDomyojis' houseto help Tsukushi, who wanted to get inside to seeTsukasa Domyoji. She was able to get in with anold woman'shelp. Everyone wished her good luck.[2]The day after that, Tsukushi andRui Hanazawatook everyone out to eat as a thank you. They all ate heartily and quickly disappeared when Rui realized he forgot his wallet.[3] Bob was a tall individual with a slim build. He had spiky, possibly blonde hair. Bob's right ear was pierced. He wore casual clothing, such as thin T-shirts and simple pants. Bob also layered his clothing, indicating that New York was a bit chilly during that time of year.
